---
title: 'Darrell''s Top Ten Burgers List'
date: '2016-11-08T20:03:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '2420879944990925375'
blogger_filename: '/2016/11/darrells-top-ten-burgers-list.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Food'
---

In-N-Out<br />
Five Guys<br />
Kincaid's<br />
Twisted Root Burger Co.<br />
Smashburger<br />
Whataburger<br />
Jack in the box<br />
<br /><br /><br /><br /><br />********<br />
<br />
<b>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<br />
New Here?<br />

</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
<br />
